html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating Lunar Rift and defeating Celestial Scion

“Parts cut according to the correct specifications for W.A.R.B.O.T. construction.”

-

The W.A.R.B.O.T. Parts are the ingredients that are used to upgrade the W.A.R.B.O.T. Base. The recipe is unlocked once players defeat Celestial Scion for the first time. They can only be crafted near the Notional Fabricator and cannot be prototyped.


ResourcesCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam
